notes:
Did not do any tweaks, since I do not know how, but after playing episode 3, now that it is released, I can say the game is playable, but I had stutters/lagg every once in a while when playing, even-though my frame-rate was locked at 60. I played at 1080p since running at 4K was only giving me around 45 FPS.

I also noticed shadows where sometimes flickering in the distance and some objects only appeared at certain spots/camera angles.

Still very playable though!
title: The Walking Dead: The Final Season

notes: Half a second stutter when loading a new area but that's it, everything else works fine
title: The Walking Dead: The Final Season
The Walking Dead: The Final Season

notes: Occasional stutter but is perfectly playable.
title: The Walking Dead: The Final Season

notes: Full playthrough of the whole game from episodes 1-4 without any problems. There is some occasional stutter when shaders compile but that is to be expected. As some previous reports pointed out the mouse cursor has poor latency, and sometimes you can see shadows flicker in the distance. But these are both issues that I have seen on windows too, so rating this Platinum.
title: The Walking Dead: The Final Season

notes: Runs flawlessly. Some minor occasional stutters on scene changes.
title: The Walking Dead: The Final Season
